Basic admin, WMS main chain, finance voucher/invoice/receipt/import/export, and labor personnel/attendance/salary/risk slices have real Chrome CRUD/upload/download/state-change evidence. Deep CRUD/upload/download across every remaining historical page and real third-party face gateway credentials remain Yellow before Product Green.
